subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be praise and upon thee be glory, and upon thee be greetings from the Most Glorious Beauty. I testify that thou hast spoken the truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک الثناء و علیک البهاء و علیک التحیه من الجمال الابهی اشهد بانک صدقت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @visitation Tablets, @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @eulogies; reminiscences
